creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi submitter,

This port compile fine, but we have some problems to remove the
installed files. Please, consult the above log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~lippe/logs/work/amtterm.log

I'll wait a response, thank you by your contribution.

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
